checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
CAPTCHA detected: captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /signin — no password field (possibly SSO/OAuth only)

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, anthropic, claude, ccbot
robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 15 divs with only 2 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 6/9 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 2/2 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 2 headings, well-structured
1 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 4/5 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~3,255 tokens raw — efficient
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 12 — clean structure
Page read cost: <$0.05 per load — affordable

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, main, navigation, search
No images found
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
1 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
2 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 242ms
Compact payload: 13KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 5 scripts, 2 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: gzip

checks.name: agents_txt
findings: No agents.txt found — agents have no machine-readable permission manifest

checks.name: a2a
findings: No A2A Agent Card found (/.well-known/agent.json) — agents can't discover this service's capabilities

checks.name: x402
findings: No x402 discovery endpoint found
No HTTP 402 responses detected on common paths
No payment protocol signals detected
